open_prs.description: AlphaFilter 0 sorry + CORRESPONDENCE + CRITIQUE update (run8) - PR #11

bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN, violates ne_zero. Loop callers: rtl_direct_mission_land.cpp:73, mission_base.cpp:80 get step=0 (infinite loop risk). TECS.cpp:198, FlightTaskOrbit.cpp:138 get 0 (incorrect sign).

notes: Rat.sub_add_cancel/Rat.sub_self: IMPLICIT args - use bare (no explicit args)
Rat.add_le_add_right: shared term on RIGHT (a+c <= b+c). For left-shared: add_comm first.
x^0=1: use 'have h0 := by simp' (simp knows pow_zero)
Rat.add_le_add_left: c+a <= c+b iff a<=b (note: c on LEFT)
Deadzone sorry fix key: neg branch uses Rat.abs_of_nonpos + Rat.neg_lt_neg_iff.mp(rw Rat.neg_neg)
AlphaFilter ge_sample fix: use Rat.neg_le_neg on (alpha*(state-sample) <= state-sample), then rewrite -(alpha*(state-sample)) = alpha*(sample-state) using <- Rat.mul_neg + Rat.neg_sub
AlphaFilter mono_state fix: split sample-s1 = (sample-s2)+(s2-s1), factor alpha*(sample-s2), reduce to alphaUpdate_le_sample for s1/s2

AlphaFilter iterate_formula fix: use 'induction n generalizing state' (NOT plain induction - need IH to apply to alphaUpdate state alpha target); helper alphaUpdate_sub_target proved via simp+rw+neg_add+neg_neg+add_left_comm
CI at .github/workflows/lean-ci.yml - working, no Mathlib deps needed
Deadzone range bounds (le_one, ge_neg_one): fully proved without Mathlib using Rat.mul_neg_iff_of_pos_right (neg branch) and Rat.mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (pos branch)

WelfordMean Lean plan: welfordUpdate over Rat, ignore Kahan compensator, ignore UINT16_MAX overflow, prove mean_invariant by induction + welfordFold_mean for list. M2=sum-of-squares is the hard theorem.
